assertions.reason: The public landing-page CTAs now work: clicking "Get Started Free" navigated to http://localhost:3200/register, and clicking "Book a Demo" navigated to the public demo route at http://localhost:3200/demo where a visible booking form rendered with Full name, Work email, Organisation name, Care domain, and Request demo fields. No visible runtime errors appeared during the CTA flow.
evidence: dom-inspection:demo-form-fields=Full name|Work email|Organisation name|Phone number (optional)|Care domain|Request demo

assertions.reason: Keyboard focus is visible and the landing page is tab-navigable, but the rerun accessibility audit still fails basic checks. Axe reported 2 serious violations: invalid aria-label usage on three testimonial star-rating divs and insufficient color contrast on four visible text elements ("★ You're here", the comparison update note, the compliance subtitle, and the footer copyright text).
evidence: focus-indicator:Complete Care link outline=oklab(0.708 0 0 / 0.5) auto 1px; outline-offset=1px
axe:2 serious violations -> aria-prohibited-attr on 3 div[aria-label='5 out of 5 stars']; color-contrast on 4 elements

axe:contrast-targets=★ You're here|Comparison based on publicly available feature information. Last updated April 2026.|Compliant with CQC & Ofsted requirements|© 2026 Complete Care Ltd. All rights reserved. Registered in England & Wales.

assertions.reason: The landing page renders title, description, and Open Graph fields, but the SEO/social metadata is still populated with local development URLs instead of a public canonical/shareable origin. The rendered canonical URL is http://localhost:3200 and og:image is http://localhost:3200/og-image.png.
evidence: title=Complete Care — UK Care Management Platform | Complete Care
description=The only platform purpose-built for domiciliary care, supported living, and children's residential homes — with native Ofsted + CQC compliance and AI throughout.
og:title=Complete Care — UK Care Management Platform
og:description=Manage domiciliary care, supported living, and children's residential homes from a single unified platform with native CQC and Ofsted compliance.

frictions.description: A cookie-consent banner appeared on the first landing-page load and partially covered the hero CTAs until dismissed.
frictions.resolution: Clicked Reject once, then continued the public-route assertions in the same browser session.

notes: Rerun executed only on public routes with a single agent-browser session.
Landing and demo-page console/page errors were empty during this rerun.
Accessibility audit was executed against the rendered landing page with axe-core runOnly tags wcag2a and wcag2aa.
